## Traceability

- Feature Blueprint / ADR: <!-- e.g. ADO/01_Architecture/ADR/ADR-000X-....md -->
- Related Decision Log entry: <!-- ID from ADO/00_Core/Decision_Log.md, if applicable -->

Per `Feature_Blueprint_Standard.md`, every implementation task must trace back to an approved Feature Blueprint or ADR. A PR without this link should not be merged.

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the approved Blueprint/ADR scope (no undocumented scope expansion)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the changed behavior
- [ ] `ADO/00_Core/Decision_Log.md` updated if this introduces a new decision
- [ ] `ADO/00_Core/Risk_Register.md` updated if this closes or introduces a risk
- [ ] No secrets, service account files, or `.env` values committed
